_description: Default configuration for distributed pipeline runs using IngestorEngine. CLI arguments override these values.

defaults._max_tickers_comment: null = all available tickers. Set to integer to limit.
defaults._days_comment: Number of days of historical data to fetch
defaults._dry_run_comment: If true, simulate API calls without making real requests
defaults._build_silver_comment: If true, build silver layer models after ingestion
defaults._log_level_comment: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR
defaults._storage_path_comment: Absolute path to storage root. Contains bronze/ and silver/ subdirectories.

alpha_vantage._ticker_source_comment: How to select tickers: 'market_cap' = ranked by market cap from company_reference, 'seed' = use ticker_seed table
alpha_vantage._endpoints_comment: Endpoints to ingest. listing_status first for ticker discovery. Available: listing_status, time_series_daily, time_series_daily_adjusted, company_overview, global_quote, income_statement, balance_sheet, cash_flow, earnings, dividends, splits

chicago._endpoints_comment: 24 Chicago endpoints. Budget, wards, and traffic_congestion endpoints use multi-year view_id iteration. Excluded: cta_bus_stops (non-tabular KMZ). Deprecated (404): economic_indicators, per_capita_income, unemployment_rates.

cook_county._endpoints_comment: All 13 Cook County endpoints covering finance, housing, regulatory, and geospatial data.

silver_models._models_comment: Models to build. Build order: temporal → securities → company → stocks → forecast. Dependencies auto-resolved.

cluster._spark_master_comment: Spark master URL. 'auto' = discover from SPARK_MASTER_URL env var or use local
cluster._fallback_to_local_comment: If cluster connection fails, run locally
cluster._task_batch_size_comment: Number of tickers to process in each batch

ticker_source._priority_comment: Order of sources to try for ticker discovery. NO HARDCODED FALLBACKS.
ticker_source._listing_status_comment: Ticker reference from LISTING_STATUS endpoint (bulk listing)
ticker_source._company_overview_comment: Company data from COMPANY_OVERVIEW endpoint (has CIK, sector, etc.)
ticker_source._time_series_daily_comment: Daily OHLCV data from TIME_SERIES_DAILY_ADJUSTED endpoint
ticker_source._filter_us_exchanges_comment: Only include tickers from US exchanges (NYSE, NASDAQ, etc.)

retry._comment: Retry configuration for failed API calls

profiles._comment: Named profiles for common run scenarios. Use --profile to activate.
profiles._write_batch_size_comment: Records to buffer before writing to Delta. Default 500k. Prevents memory overflow on large datasets.

quick_test._endpoints_comment: Full Alpha Vantage coverage: prices, reference, financials, and corporate actions
quick_test._use_raw_cache_comment: false = hit API for fresh data
quick_test._compute_technicals_comment: Compute SMA, RSI, Bollinger, volatility after silver build
quick_test._comment: Full pipeline test: 5 tickers, all Alpha Vantage endpoints → bronze → silver → technicals → forecast

dev._endpoints_comment: Full Alpha Vantage coverage: prices, reference, financials, and corporate actions
dev._max_pending_writes_comment: 0 = synchronous writes. Ensures each batch completes before next.
dev._use_raw_cache_comment: Reads from cached raw JSON - no API calls
dev._compute_technicals_comment: Compute SMA, RSI, Bollinger, volatility after silver build
dev._comment: Dev run: Alpha Vantage full pipeline → bronze → silver → technicals → forecast (all tickers)

dev_municipal._comment: Municipal/county data only - no securities. Bronze only.

chicago_only._comment: Chicago only - single endpoint for testing BULK ingestion path.

municipal_only._comment: Chicago + Cook County - one endpoint each for testing BULK ingestion.

municipal_all._comment: All Chicago + Cook County endpoints. Auto-discovers from provider (CSV for large tables, JSON API for small).

listing_status._comment: Ingest all US tickers from LISTING_STATUS (single bulk API call). Run this first to populate ticker reference.

prices._comment: Ingest daily OHLCV prices for all tickers. Uses append strategy to preserve existing data.

dev_fill._max_pending_writes_comment: 0 = synchronous writes. Ensures each batch completes and memory is freed before next batch.
dev_fill._comment: Alpha Vantage full ingestion with synchronous writes. All tickers, all endpoints.

raw_to_bronze._use_raw_cache_comment: Reads from storage/raw/alpha_vantage/{endpoint}/*.json instead of API calls
raw_to_bronze._comment: Reprocess raw JSON files to bronze. No API calls - uses cached raw layer.

raw_to_silver._use_raw_cache_comment: Reads from storage/raw/alpha_vantage/{endpoint}/*.json instead of API calls
raw_to_silver._comment: Full reprocess: raw JSON → bronze → silver. No API calls.

alpha_vantage_full._endpoints_comment: All Alpha Vantage endpoints: prices, company, financials, and corporate actions
alpha_vantage_full._comment: Alpha Vantage full: raw → bronze → silver → technicals → forecast. No API calls.

pipeline_test._endpoints_comment: Full Alpha Vantage coverage: prices, reference, financials, and corporate actions
pipeline_test._use_raw_cache_comment: Reads from cached raw JSON files - NO API calls
pipeline_test._comment: Full pipeline: all providers → bronze → silver → technicals. Chicago/Cook County bronze-only.

pipeline_test_50._endpoints_comment: Full Alpha Vantage coverage: prices, reference, financials, and corporate actions
pipeline_test_50._comment: Full pipeline test: 50 tickers → bronze → silver → technicals → forecast

silver_only._comment: Build silver models only from existing bronze data. No ingestion.

silver_with_forecast._forecast_tickers_comment: Number of tickers to forecast (top by market cap)
silver_with_forecast._comment: Build silver models then run forecasts. No ingestion.

forecast_only._comment: Run forecasts only on existing silver data.

full_forecast._comment: Full forecast run: all tickers, all models. Long running.

production._comment: Full pipeline: all tickers, bronze + silver
